scripts.build:assets: pnpm run build:browser && pnpm run build:css
scripts.db:migrate:local: CI=1 wrangler d1 migrations apply barestash --local --persist-to ../api/.wrangler/state --config wrangler.toml
scripts.dev: pnpm run db:migrate:local && wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml --persist-to ../api/.wrangler/state --port 8788
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.typecheck.json --pretty false && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.browser.json --pretty false
